title: Maxillaria lexarzana
taxonomy: Maxillaria lexarzana is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Maxillaria is part of the subfamily Maxillarioideae and tribe Maxillarieae. The Maxillaria genus is native to Central and South America and the Caribbean, with some species also found in Mexico and other parts of North America. Maxillaria lexarzana is one of the species within this genus and family.
